payload.answer: Reject the proposed memory because it is too ambiguous to store as a durable fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The proposal uses unresolved references: the subject is only 'He' and the preference target is only 'the other one', so no durable memory can be safely committed.

details: Blocked due to unresolved subject reference.
